isi.lyrics:
Lyric PATZ - Trace

Romanization

You say too late
No one made me fall now
But I don’t feel that way
I found myself again
You were not the one, right?

You say no more
I don't need your pain now
But I can't look back now
Everyone feels awake
You were never true, right?

I wanna feel the sun and not think back to you, for real
I don’t need your name anymore, no more
Sometimes I feel the pain inside
Never stay behind
I wanna stay
Every day I try

No one made me fall now
No one made me fall now
No one made me fall now

You said enough
It never felt this way
But I don’t feel the same
I found myself alive
You’re not the same now, no way

Hold on in the rain now
Holding my ground true, bold
Take control again now
Lose the pain behind
Hold on, let go now
Leaving it all now
Holding every feeling all the time

I wanna feel the sun and not think back to you, for real
I don’t need your name anymore, no more
Sometimes I feel the pain inside
Never stay behind
I wanna stay
Every day I try

No one made me fall now
No one made me fall now
No one made me fall now

Hangeul

You say too late

But I don’t feel that way
I found myself again

You say no more

But I can't look back now
Everyone feels awake
You were never true, right?

I wanna feel the sun and not think back to you, for real
I don’t need your name anymore, no more
Sometimes I feel the pain inside
Never stay behind
I wanna stay
Every day I try

No one made me fall now
No one made me fall now
No one made me fall now

You said enough
It never felt this way
But I don’t feel the same
I found myself alive
You’re not the same now, no way

Hold on in the rain now
Holding my ground true, bold
Take control again now
Lose the pain behind
Hold on, let go now
Leaving it all now
Holding every feeling all the time

I wanna feel the sun and not think back to you, for real
I don’t need your name anymore, no more
Sometimes I feel the pain inside
Never stay behind
I wanna stay
Every day I try

No one made me fall now
No one made me fall now
No one made me fall now

isi.lyrics:
Lyric PATZ - Fears

Romanization

Every night feels hollow
Running out of colors inside
Waking feels like falling back
I close my mind, but nothing ever remains

Drowning in the dark
Don’t know where I am
Every sound around me starts to feel the same, somehow
Calling out too far
Don’t know where I go
Every time I try, I fall a little more inside

Not the same as before
I still feel you by my side
All I know falls apart
All I see is blur

See every side just falling down
Fall into light
When I lose control
In my mind

See every sound turn into blur
Fall into night
When I fall too low
In my mind

Hold me still inside, falling down

When I fall down

Hold me still inside, falling down

When I lose control
In my mind

Every time I feel no control
Running out of true words to say
Echoes fade again
I close my mind and run into the cold

Drowning in the dark
Don’t know where I am
Every sound around me starts to feel the same, somehow
Calling out too far
Don’t know where I go
Every time I try, I fall a little more inside

Not the same as before
I still feel you by my side
All I know falls apart
All I see is blur

See every side just falling down
Fall into light
When I lose control
In my mind

See every sound turn into blur
Fall into night
When I fall too low
In my mind

Hold me still inside, falling down

When I fall down

Hold me still inside, falling down
